nasb.text: But when he is found, he must repay sevenfold; He must give all the substance of his house.

esv.text: but if he is caught, he will pay sevenfold; he will give all the goods of his house.

cnv.text: 但如果他被捉住，就要七倍償還， 要把他家裡所有的財物都交出來。

ccb.text: 但若被抓到，他要偿还七倍， 就是倾家荡产也要偿还。

csbs.text: 但如果他被发现，就要偿还七倍， 甚至要交出家里一切的财物。
